commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a mocked Vitest + Playwright Control UI browser E2E lane, routes it through targeted test scripts, CI, docs, and a `control-ui-e2e` skill.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a test-infrastructure PR, not a bug report. The PR body provides focused command proof for the new mocked browser lane rather than a failing current-main reproduction.
commands.review_followup: Human maintainer review should confirm the root E2E browser prerequisite, final E2E CI result, and dependency-bot alert state; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.

target.title: test: add mocked Control UI E2E tests and playwright for local verification and development
target.body:
## Summary

- Add a mocked Control UI E2E lane that runs the real Vite app in Playwright through Vitest.
- Mock the Control UI bootstrap config and Gateway WebSocket so agents can verify chat-flow changes without live Gateway state.
- Wire the lane into targeted test routing, `pnpm test:ui:e2e`, the repo E2E aggregate, docs, CI Chromium install, and a `$control-ui-e2e` skill.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.ui-e2e.config.ts --configLoader runner ui/src/ui/e2e/chat-flow.e2e.test.ts`
- `node scripts/test-projects.mjs ui/src/ui/e2e`
- `pnpm test:ui:e2e`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.ui.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/test-ui.tsbuildinfo`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs ui/src/ui/e2e/chat-flow.e2e.test.ts ui/src/test-helpers/control-ui-e2e.ts test/vitest/vitest.ui-e2e.config.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Control UI chat-flow changes now have a mocked browser E2E lane that boots the real UI, sends a chat prompt, verifies `chat.send`, emits a final Gateway chat event, and checks the rendered assistant response.
Real environment tested: macOS local Codex worktree, Vite Control UI server on loopback, Playwright Chromium installed through the repo UI package.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.ui-e2e.config.ts --configLoader runner ui/src/ui/e2e/chat-flow.e2e.test.ts`
Evidence after fix: The focused UI E2E test passed; targeted lint, UI test typecheck, routing tests, diff check, and autoreview also passed.
Observed result after fix: A coding agent can run `$control-ui-e2e` or `pnpm test:ui:e2e` to validate the mocked Control UI chat flow end to end.
What was not tested: I did not run the full aggregate `pnpm test:e2e` locally because it includes broader Gateway E2E coverage beyond this UI lane.
target.author: amknight
